notes: Macro definition copied verbatim from Macros/BMI.sas. Eight synthesized subjects with realistic weight (lb) and height (in) ranges; the macro's own demo block uses Wgt=125, Hgt=63, but a single row gives no signal — the bundle prints a small spread instead. The DATA step pattern (BMI=%BMI(Wgt,Hgt)) matches the macro's documented usage.
